// Mock data — mirrors the backend in-memory store

export const mockCategories = [
  { id: 1, name: "Electronics",     description: "Electronic devices and components" },
  { id: 2, name: "Office Supplies", description: "Stationery and office equipment" },
  { id: 3, name: "Furniture",       description: "Desks, chairs, and storage" },
  { id: 4, name: "Networking",      description: "Cables, switches, and routers" },
  { id: 5, name: "Peripherals",     description: "Keyboards, mice, monitors" },
];

export const mockItems = [
